Off Calendar Feb-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Wayne Sims, Esq., Sims Law Firm, 949-717-7900, for defendant and moving party Burlington Northern and Sante Fe Railway company telephonic appearance per Court Call.
*DEFENDANT BURLINGTON NORTHERN AND SANTA FE RAILWAY COMPANY's Motion For Change Of Place Of Trial -- the tentative ruling is granted, Defendant's motion to transfer is granted pursuant to CCP 397(c). Case transferred to Los Angeles County. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
(DAG/301/KS-X)

Selim Mounedji, Esq. of SIMS LAW FIRM 949/717-7900, for defendant THE BURLINGTON NORTHERN AND SANTA FE RAILWAY COMPANY moving for change of place of trial

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court continued DEFENDANT BURLINGTON NORTHERN AND SANTA FE RAILWAY COMPANY's Motion For Change Of Place Of Trial to February 10, 2003. Defendant RLI Ins. Co.'s opposition is due on 1/31 and reply due on 2/5, notice waived. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
